articles.title: Grab a 1440p-capable gaming rig with an RTX 5060 for just $1,049 — Save up to 25% on ABS Flux & Cyclone prebuilts that also feature 32 GB of RAM
articles.summary: Building a PC has its advantages, such as cheaper parts costs and a learning experience that'll stick with you forever. However, when our AI overlords suck the joy out of DIY custom rigs, we need to venture out to find good deals in such turbulent times, and these prebuilts from ABS provide exactly that.
articles.title_zh: 購買配備 RTX 5060 的 1440p 遊戲電腦，僅需 $1,049 — ABS Flux & Cyclone 預組裝機節省高達 25%，另配 32 GB RAM
articles.summary_zh: 自組 PC 雖有成本優勢和學習價值，但 ABS 的預組裝機在當前市場環境中提供了絕佳的交易機會。

articles.title: This must-have miniature Macintosh retro dock gives your M4 Mac Mini a 1980s makeover — equipped with a 5-inch HD display and M.2 NVMe SSD slot
articles.summary: The Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station will add USB ports, memory card readers, and an external SSD enclosure to your Mac mini while giving you a small '80s Macintosh on your desk.
articles.title_zh: 必備迷你 Macintosh 復古擴展塢為您的 M4 Mac Mini 打造 1980 年代風格 — 配備 5 英寸 HD 顯示屏和 M.2 NVMe SSD 插槽
articles.summary_zh: Wokyis M5 Retro Dock Station 為 Mac mini 增添 USB 連接埠、記憶卡讀卡機和外部 SSD 外殼，同時在桌面上呈現懷舊的 80 年代 Macintosh 風貌。

articles.title: Sony increases prices for refurbished PS5 slims by $100 — PS5 Fortnite bundle is out of stock, marking the end of new $399 consoles
articles.summary: Sony increased prices for refurbished PlayStation 5 Slim consoles, following its move last month to make brand-new models more expensive.
articles.title_zh: Sony 將翻新 PS5 Slim 主機價格上漲 $100 — PS5 Fortnite 套裝缺貨，標誌著 $399 新主機時代的終結
articles.summary_zh: Sony 上調翻新 PlayStation 5 Slim 主機價格，延續上月調漲全新機型價格的舉措。

articles.title: Potential Route To Photonic FPCA Using NV Low-Loss Phase Change Material (Oxford)
articles.summary: A new technical paper, “Nonvolatile photonic field-programmable coupler array,” was published by researchers at University of Oxford. Abstract “Programmable photonic networks carry out universal unitary functions by independently operating on the amplitude and phase of guided light. Exploiting the reconfigurability and spatiospectral degrees of freedom of these systems, the majority of state-of-the-art photonics applications, ranging from microwave photonics to photonic computing and optical communication links, can be demonstrated in one unified system. Existing techniques require a large footprint due to weak modulation efficiency, and continuous power dissipation to maintain the configured state. Here, we demonstrate a programmable recirculating mesh unit cell based on
articles.title_zh: 使用 NV 低損耗相變材料的光子 FPGA 潛在路線（牛津大學）
articles.summary_zh: 牛津大學研究人員發表新論文《非揮發性光子現場可編程耦合器陣列》，探討可程式化光子網路通過獨立操作引導光的振幅和相位來執行通用單位函數的方法。

articles.title: Google Is A Full Stack AI Player, And Is Playing Well
articles.title_zh: Google 是完整的 AI 全棧玩家，且表現出色

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘This Day’ turns photo cleanup into a simple daily habit
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Everyone probably has a massive photo library going back for years, maybe even over a decade. Over time, that consumes more and more storage – and this becomes a problem, especially if you’re paying for iCloud storage. On the other hand, decluttering isn’t easy. This Day turns photo decluttering into a habit, by designing an interface that allows you to address it one day at a time. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'This Day' 將照片清理變成簡單的日常習慣
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 每週展示獨立應用世界最新應用的系列專題。大多數人都有龐大的照片庫，可能已有多年甚至十多年的歷史。

articles.title: Limited-time Apple Card promo offers $100 Bonus Daily Cash when you add a co-owner
articles.summary: Apple Card has been throwing around loads of limited-time sign up offers lately , but those only help new customers – not existing ones. This new offer, however, benefits existing Apple Card users. Through May 18th, Apple Card users can add a co-owner to their account and get $100 in Daily Cash after the new co-owner spends $100 in their first 30 days. more…
articles.title_zh: 限時 Apple Card 優惠：添加共同所有人時獲得 $100 日常現金獎勵
articles.summary_zh: Apple Card 最近推出了許多限時註冊優惠，但這些只惠及新客戶。這項新優惠則惠及現有 Apple Card 用戶，他們可在 5 月 18 日之前添加共同所有人並獲得 $100 日常現金。

articles.title: xAI is bringing Grok Voice mode to Apple CarPlay
articles.summary: Apple CarPlay recently gained support for AI chatbots, and the third app to add support is coming soon: Grok. more…
articles.title_zh: xAI 正將 Grok 語音模式帶到 Apple CarPlay
articles.summary_zh: Apple CarPlay 近期獲得了對 AI 聊天機器人的支持，Grok 將成為第三個添加支持的應用。

articles.title: Apple @ Work: Unpacking the top mobile threats facing your Apple fleet this year
articles.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage, and protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . If you spend enough time managing Apple devices in an enterprise environment, you start to spot patterns in how security incidents happen. It is rarely a cinematic Ocean’s 11-style hack. Instead, it is usually a user delaying an iOS update for three months or an employee connecting to a
articles.title_zh: Apple @ Work：解析今年 Apple 設備面臨的頂級移動威脅
articles.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle 獨家呈獻，Mosyle 是唯一的 Apple 統一平台，提供在單一專業級平台上無縫部署、管理和保護 Apple 工作設備所需的全部解決方案。

articles.title: Google explains why Android AICore occasionally takes up more storage
articles.summary: Android AICore lets you “run generative AI features directly on your Android phone or tablet’s hardware.” These models ( Gemini Nano ) are inherently large, but Google now has a more detailed explanation of why Android AICore storage occasionally spikes. more…
articles.title_zh: Google 解釋為何 Android AICore 偶爾會佔用更多存儲空間
articles.summary_zh: Android AICore 可讓用戶直接在 Android 手機或平板電腦硬件上運行生成式 AI 功能。Google 現已詳細解釋了 Android AICore 存儲偶爾激增的原因。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Honor 600 Pro overshadows the Honor 600
articles.summary: In Europe, the Honor 600 Pro is 43% more expensive than the vanilla model. However, in Malaysia, the upcharge is only 27% – and that makes a difference. The Pro was always the better phone between these two, the only question was whether its higher price was worth it. Memory Honor 600 Honor 600 Pro 12/256GB €650 - - MYR 3,100 12/512GB €700 MYR 2,600 €1,000 MYR 3,300 Based on last week’s poll, the answer is a resounding “yes”. Okay, the Honor 600 Pro is not the hottest new phone in town and price...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Honor 600 Pro 蓋過 Honor 600
articles.summary_zh: 在歐洲，Honor 600 Pro 比標準版貴 43%，但在馬來西亞則只貴 27%。Pro 版始終是更好的手機，唯一的問題是其更高的價格是否值得。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus vs. Galaxy S25 Plus
articles.summary: After yet another modest upgrade, you might be wondering what would be the most sensible pick between the newly released Samsung Galaxy S26+ and the year-old Samsung Galaxy S25+. After all, it looks like the latter gets you a lot of the way there at a more reasonable starting price. But not everything becomes immediately apparent from the spec sheet alone. There are still some under-the-hood changes that need exploring. One example is the chipset. With the S26 series, Samsung is back to the dual-chip strategy for the majority of the markets, leaving places like Europe and South Korea with...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 Plus vs. Galaxy S25 Plus
articles.summary_zh: 在又一次適度升級後，你可能在想新發布的 Samsung Galaxy S26+ 和一年前的 Samsung Galaxy S25+ 之間哪個是最明智的選擇。後者以更合理的起價為你提供了很多功能。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Nothing Phone (3) goes on sale, Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10 series also discounted
articles.summary: Mother’s Day is Sunday next week and we’re already seeing some shipping times slip to after the holiday. Most phones will still arrive on time, however. Admittedly, the Nothing Phone (3) probably won’t be mom’s first pick – but with a $200 discount, this Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 powered phone offers a good balance between performance and camera quality. It has a large 50MP 1/1.3” sensor in the main camera, a 50MP 3x telephoto camera, a 50MP ultra wide (114°) and a 50MP selfie camera. The phone has a 6.67” 10-bit OLED display on the front and the customizable Glyph Matrix on the back. It runs...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Nothing Phone (3) 開始促銷，Galaxy S26 和 Pixel 10 系列也有折扣
articles.summary_zh: 母親節在下週日，我們已經看到某些運輸時間延遲到假期後。不過大多數手機仍會準時送達。Nothing Phone (3) 可能不是媽媽的首選，但這款搭載 Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 的手機有 $200 折扣，性價比不錯。

articles.title: Apple stops selling the M4 Mac Mini's 256GB storage model through its online store
articles.summary: Apple launched the M4 chip-powered Mac Mini in 2024, with its base model having 256GB of storage. This model went out of stock on Apple's online store last month in some countries, including the US, and has now been removed from Apple's website worldwide. As a result, the new base storage for the M4 Mac Mini on Apple's website is 512GB, which costs $799 with the default 16GB RAM option. There are two more RAM options - 24GB and 32GB. If you want more storage, you can upgrade to 1TB or 2TB. If you upgrade to the M4 Pro chip, you can get the Mac Mini with up to 64GB RAM and up to 8TB...
articles.title_zh: Apple 停止通過在線商店銷售 M4 Mac Mini 的 256GB 存儲模型
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在 2024 年推出了搭載 M4 芯片的 Mac Mini，基礎型號配有 256GB 存儲。該型號上月在包括美國在內的部分國家的 Apple 在線商店缺貨，現已從 Apple 網站全球下架。

articles.title: Xiaomi Civi 6, Civi 6 Pro's specs tipped
articles.summary: Xiaomi unveiled the Civi 5 Pro last May, so we are expecting the Chinese brand to launch its successor soon. We haven't heard anything about the Civi 6 Pro from Xiaomi yet, but when it arrives, it will have the Dimensity 9500 SoC under the hood. The word comes from reliable tipster Digital Chat Station, who also said that the Xiaomi Civi 6 Pro will pack a 6.83" 1.5K display and feature a 50MP periscope telephoto camera with 5x zoom. Xiaomi Civi 5 Pro Furthermore, DCS said that Xiaomi will also launch Civi 6, which will come with the Dimensity 8500 chip, a 6.59" 1.5K display, and...
articles.title_zh: Xiaomi Civi 6、Civi 6 Pro 規格曝光
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 於去年 5 月推出了 Civi 5 Pro，預計該品牌很快將推出其後續產品。據可靠爆料人 Digital Chat Station 稱，Civi 6 Pro 將搭載 Dimensity 9500 SoC。

articles.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
articles.summary: Bad news for Tilly Norwood.
articles.title_zh: AI生成的演員和劇本現已不符合奧斯卡資格
articles.summary_zh: 對Tilly Norwood來說是個壞消息。

articles.title: The best AI dictation apps, tested and ranked
articles.summary: AI-powered dictation apps are useful for replying to emails, taking notes, and even coding through your voice
articles.title_zh: 最佳AI聽寫應用程式，測試和排名
articles.summary_zh: AI驅動的聽寫應用程式可用於回覆電子郵件、記筆記，甚至通過語音進行編碼。

articles.title: Inside OpenSearch’s bid to become the default AI data layer
articles.summary: Most of the engineering teams I work with started with open source OpenSearch for log analytics and enterprise search. But as their requirements have since shifted to semantic retrieval and agent memory, they’re now trying to figure out just how much of that AI application stack they can consolidate onto infrastructure they already run. The first quarter of 2026 has been very good news on that front. OpenSearch 3.5 and 3.6, which shipped in February and April, respectively, are worth understanding if you inherited an OpenSearch deployment and are now being asked to run agents on it. Here’s what to know. Dense and sparse vector search aren’t interchangeable Teams like to start with knn_vector , and that’s understandable. Point it at your embedding model’s outpu
articles.title_zh: OpenSearch 成為預設 AI 資料層的野心
articles.summary_zh: 許多工程團隊最初使用開源 OpenSearch 進行日誌分析和企業搜尋，但隨著需求轉向語義檢索和代理記憶體，他們正在探索可以在 OpenSearch 上整合多少 AI 應用程式堆疊。

articles.title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
articles.summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency said it has summoned former economy minister Rafizi Ramli for questioning following a probe into a deal involving Arm Holdings Plc.
articles.title_zh: 馬來西亞反貪局將詢問前經濟部長有關Arm交易案
articles.summary_zh: 馬來西亞反貪局表示已傳喚前經濟部長Rafizi Ramli進行詢問，涉及對Arm Holdings Plc交易案的調查。

articles.title: Nvidia’s Push Into Physical AI Sparks Rally in Asian Partners
articles.summary: The list of Asian stocks that benefit from business partnership with Nvidia Corp. is getting longer, as the region further integrates into the AI chip giant’s business ecosystem.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia推進物理AI引發亞洲合作夥伴股市上漲
articles.summary_zh: 受惠於Nvidia Corp.商業合作的亞洲股票名單不斷擴大，該地區進一步整合到AI芯片巨頭的業務生態系統中。

articles.title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
articles.summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 演員Ben McKenzie在紀錄片中探討加密貨幣詐騙
articles.summary_zh: 以《The OC》知名的演員Ben McKenzie討論了他從演員轉向調查加密貨幣的過程，他創作並執導了新紀錄片《Everyone Is Lying to You for Money》。

articles.title: Research roundup: 6 cool science stories we almost missed
articles.summary: It’s a regrettable reality that there is never enough time to cover all the interesting scientific stories we come across. So every month, we highlight a handful of the best stories that nearly slipped through the cracks. April’s list includes tracking Roman ship repairs, the discovery that mushrooms can detect human urine, crushing soda cans for science, and the physics of why dolphins can swim so fast. Physics of why dolphins swim so fast Dolphins are very good swimmers but the exact mechanisms by which they achieve their impressive speed and agility in water have remained murky. Japanese scientists from the University of Osaka ran multiple supercomputer simulations to learn more about how dolphins optimize their propulsion and found it has to do with the vortices, or eddies, produced by
articles.title_zh: 研究綜合報導：6則我們幾乎錯過的有趣科學故事
articles.summary_zh: 由於時間有限，無法報導所有有趣的科學故事，我們每月精選接近被忽略的最佳故事，四月名單包括羅馬船舶維修追蹤和蘑菇相關發現等。

articles.title: 【2026 企業資安大調查】一張圖看2026年一般製造業企業資安風險
articles.summary:
一般製造2026年的首要風險和次要風險，雖然和高科技製造業一項，但是一般製造業第一象限高衝擊高風險的項目，卻比高科技製造業還要更多，包括4項系統類風險和6項人員類風險和一項AI類的風險。
一般製造業今年也開始積極跟上生成式AI的浪潮，也願意投資在最新的AI代理應用上，但是一般製造業的AI因應能力沒有跟上來，像是AI負責任框架採用率偏低，AI治理程度也不高。企業資訊長和資安長也因此比高科技製造業更擔心生成式AI災情的發生。
立即下載完整報告【iThome 2026 CIO & CISO大調查】資安策略篇完整報告

一般製造業今年也開始積極跟上生成式AI的浪潮，也願意投資在最新的AI代理應用上，但是一般製造業的AI因應能力沒有跟上來，像是AI負責任框架採用率偏低，AI治理程度也不高。企業資訊長和資安長也因此比高科技製造業更擔心生成式AI災情的發生。

articles.title: Save $370 on this AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition with an X870E motherboard and 32GB of RAM — big savings for your next high-end build
articles.summary: This Newegg bundle offers cutting-edge performance with practical value, combining AMD’s latest flagship CPU with high-end supporting components at a discounted price.
articles.title_zh: 節省 $370 購買 AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition 搭配 X870E 主機板和 32GB RAM — 高端電腦組裝的大省錢方案
articles.summary_zh: Newegg 套裝組合提供尖端效能和實用價值，將 AMD 最新旗艦 CPU 與高階支援元件組合成優惠價格。

articles.title: A suspected YouTube interface bug spikes RAM usage above 7 gigabytes, users report severe lag and frozen tabs — bug might be trapping browsers in an endless layout loop
articles.summary: Reports of YouTube freezing browsers and consuming massive amounts of RAM are spreading online, with developers tracing the issue to a suspected UI bug that may trigger endless layout recalculations and severe system lag.
articles.title_zh: 疑似 YouTube 介面漏洞導致 RAM 用量飆升至 7GB 以上，用戶回報嚴重卡頓和分頁凍結 — 漏洞可能使瀏覽器陷入無限版面配置迴圈
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 凍結瀏覽器和消耗大量 RAM 的報告在網路上蔓延，開發者將問題追蹤至疑似 UI 漏洞，該漏洞可能觸發無限版面配置重新計算和嚴重系統卡頓。

articles.title: Popular 90s search engine ‘Ask Jeeves’ finally bites the dust — parent company shutters website that pioneered natural language queries, only a placeholder results page remains
articles.summary: IAC, the parent company of Ask Jeeves, is finally putting the search engine out to pasture after 30 years.
articles.title_zh: 熱門 90 年代搜尋引擎 'Ask Jeeves' 終於走向末路 — 母公司關閉這個開創自然語言查詢的網站，僅剩佔位符結果頁面
articles.summary_zh: IAC 作為 Ask Jeeves 的母公司，在 30 年後終於停止營運這個搜尋引擎。

articles.title: Anthropic in early talks to buy DRAM-less AI inference chips from UK startup — Fractile's SRAM architecture reduces need for pricey memory during extreme pricing and shortage crunch
articles.summary: Anthropic has reportedly held early discussions with London-based chip startup Fractile about purchasing the company's inference accelerators.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 在早期洽談向英國新創購買無 DRAM AI 推論晶片 — Fractile 的 SRAM 架構在極端價格和短缺危機期間降低昂貴記憶體的需求
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 據報已與倫敦晶片新創公司 Fractile 進行早期討論，商談購買其推論加速器。

articles.title: Chinese court rules companies can't fire workers just because AI is cheaper — ruling says automation alone doesn't justify layoffs
articles.summary: Chinese courts ruled that companies cannot automatically fire workers simply because AI can do the job more cheaply, declaring that automation alone does not justify dismissal under labor law.
articles.title_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能因 AI 更便宜而開除員工 — 裁決表示自動化本身不足以成為裁員理由
articles.summary_zh: 中國法院裁定公司不能僅因 AI 可更便宜地完成工作就自動開除員工，宣稱自動化本身在勞動法下不足以正當化解僱。

articles.title: Jensen says Nvidia now has 'zero percent' market share in China — says US export policy 'has already largely backfired'
articles.summary: Jensen Huang says China has become a lost market for Nvidia due to U.S. sanctions, but warns that America could lose out in a broader AI competition.
articles.title_zh: Jensen 表示 Nvidia 在中國現在擁有「零百分比」市佔率 — 稱美國出口政策「已經基本上適得其反」
articles.summary_zh: Jensen Huang 表示中國因美國制裁已成為 Nvidia 的失落市場，但警告美國可能在更廣泛的 AI 競爭中落後。

articles.title: Utah first state to hold websites liable for users who mask their location with VPNs — law goes into effect, designed to prevent bypassing age checks
articles.summary: Utah's Online Age Verification Amendments, formally Senate Bill 73, take effect on May 6.
articles.title_zh: 猶他州首個對使用 VPN 隱藏位置的用戶網站問責的州 — 法律生效，目的是防止規避年齡檢查
articles.summary_zh: 猶他州線上年齡驗證修正案（正式名稱為參議院法案 73）於 5 月 6 日開始生效。

articles.title: Keychain-size ‘GameCube’ uses genuine Nintendo silicon — system also includes a dock, design shared to GitHub
articles.summary: Video showcases the Nintendo Kawaii project, in which modders have shrunken a boxy GameCube down to a keychain.
articles.title_zh: 鑰匙圈大小的 'GameCube' 採用真正的任天堂矽晶 — 系統包括底座，設計已分享到 GitHub
articles.summary_zh: 影片展示 Nintendo Kawaii 專案，其中 MOD 玩家已將方形 GameCube 縮小到鑰匙圈大小。

articles.title: Microsoft now recommends 32GB of RAM as the future-proof 'no worries' config for gaming — 16GB becomes the new 'practical starting point' during the RAMageddon
articles.summary: Pretty much no games recommend more than 16GB of RAM, even in the unoptimized era we're living in right now. Only a few titles at their highest presets say 32GB is ideal, so Microsoft claiming that 32GB is the future-proof standard isn't exactly wrong. You'll be fine with 16GB today, but perhaps not tomorrow.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 現在建議 32GB RAM 作為遊戲的「無後顧之憂」未來證明配置 — 16GB 成為新的「實用起點」（RAMageddon 時代）
articles.summary_zh: 即使在當前最佳化不足的時代，幾乎沒有遊戲建議超過 16GB RAM；僅少數遊戲在最高預設下表示 32GB 是理想選擇，因此 Microsoft 聲稱 32GB 是未來標準並非完全錯誤，16GB 現在可以使用，但未來可能不夠。

articles.title: Amazon’s Middle East data centers damaged by Iran drone and missile attacks will be down for several months during repairs — U.S. and Iran currently observing an uneasy truce, but renewed strikes possible if talks break down
articles.summary: Amazon says that it will take months before it can return its Bahrain and UAE data center back to full operational status. In the meantime, the company suspends billing for affected customers while also recommending that they move to other Regions to restore service.
articles.title_zh: Amazon 中東資料中心因伊朗無人機和飛彈攻擊造成損毀，維修期間將停機數月 — 美國和伊朗目前處於不穩定休戰狀態，如談判破裂可能再次遭襲
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 表示在巴林和阿聯酋資料中心恢復全面營運需要數月時間；同時公司暫停向受影響客戶計費，並建議其轉移至其他地區以恢復服務。

articles.title: Japan is deploying ultra-cheap cardboard drones built for swarm warfare and expendable combat missions — $2,000 expendable combat drones cost less than some gaming PCs
articles.summary: Japan is deploying ultra-cheap cardboard drones built for swarm warfare and expendable combat missions. The flat-packed AirKamuy 150 costs as little as $2,000 — far cheaper than many military drones.
articles.title_zh: 日本部署超便宜紙板無人機用於群體戰爭和消耗性戰鬥任務 — $2,000 消耗性戰鬥無人機成本低於許多遊戲電腦
articles.summary_zh: 日本部署超便宜紙板無人機用於群體戰爭和消耗性戰鬥任務，平型組裝 AirKamuy 150 成本低至 $2,000 — 遠低於許多軍事無人機。

articles.title: Why you need a digital spring cleaning (and how Incogni makes it effortless)
articles.summary: As winter finally thaws and the weather warms up, we’re all tackling our annual spring cleaning routines. We declutter our closets and deep-clean our homes, yet we often overlook our digital lives. Personal information like your home address, phone number, date of birth, and financial history are all scattered across the internet. It’s actively being collected and sold by invisible data brokers. Spring is the time to take out the digital trash and reclaim your privacy with Incogni , and 9to5Mac readers can save 55% right now. more…
articles.title_zh: 為什麼你需要進行數位春季大掃除（以及 Incogni 如何讓這變得輕而易舉）
articles.summary_zh: 隨著冬天消退、天氣轉暖，我們都在進行年度春季清潔。但我們常常忽視數位生活，忘記清理個人資訊如住址、電話號碼、出生日期和財務歷史等敏感數據。

articles.title: I stopped playing music on my Android phone and went back to my iPod
articles.summary: As an old-school techie whose formative years were spent tinkering with tape decks and portable CD players, I find that modern Android phones are nothing short of miracles of engineering for audio consumption. They’ve got a screen that rivals my high-end television, a DAC chip that is by all measures transparent, near-lossless wireless streaming, more storage than you can shake a stick at, and enough processing power to run a small datacenter. Yet, when I want to sit down and actually listen to an album, the phone is often the most frustrating tool in my pocket. Between the constant pings from Slack and the AI-generated discovery feeds that keep trying to shove viral tracks down my throat, the simple act of listening has become a chore. It shouldn’t have been this way. A fully connected de
articles.title_zh: 我停止在 Android 手機上播放音樂，改回使用 iPod
articles.summary_zh: 作為一位資深科技愛好者，發現現代 Android 手機在音樂播放方面是工程奇蹟，擁有可與高端電視相媲美的屏幕和高品質 DAC 芯片。

articles.title: Galaxy S27 Ultra without a 3x camera would be a hard skip for photographers
articles.summary: According to a new report, next year’s Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra might drop the lackluster 3x zoom camera , moving the next-gen flagship to a triple camera system instead of the long-running quad-array that Ultra flagships are regularly known for. With the extra space, Samsung is reportedly revamping its main camera with variable aperture capabilities while doubling down on its 5x lens to capture distant detail with a 200MP sensor of its own. Sounds reasonable on paper, but this rumor has me more than a little concerned. Not because Samsung’s 3x camera has been a must-have feature in recent Ultras. I agree with commentators who aren’t exactly enamored with Samsung’s mid-range telephoto lens. While it might come in handy for portraits, the level of detail leaves a lot to be desired, and it’s
articles.title_zh: 沒有 3x 攝像頭的 Galaxy S27 Ultra 對攝影師來說將難以接受
articles.summary_zh: 據報導，三星 Galaxy S27 Ultra 可能捨棄效果欠佳的 3x 變焦攝像頭，改用三攝系統而非傳統四攝陣列。

articles.title: YouTube Music finally looks good on foldables — if you tweak this hidden setting
articles.summary: I love YouTube Premium and YouTube Music. Even with the recent price hike, the value I get from ad-free YouTube and all the music on YouTube Music is unparalleled, especially with my family plan. That doesn’t mean I don’t have complaints, though. The device limit is stupid and difficult to reset, and the app has never been good on my foldables. Thankfully, the recent UI refresh has fixed some of my complaints with the latter. A good foldable UI — if you change this setting Before the redesign of the now playing UI, YouTube Music refused to show its foldable UI on Samsung’s foldables unless you rotated the phone into landscape. You can see this in the images above: my Galaxy Z Fold 4, which hadn’t been updated yet, has the standard UI stretched to fill its screen, wasting space. The Galaxy
articles.title_zh: YouTube Music 在可摺疊手機上終於好看了——如果你調整這個隱藏設定的話
articles.summary_zh: YouTube Music 在可摺疊手機上的顯示效果改進了，但用戶需要調整隱藏設定才能獲得最佳體驗。

articles.title: This Ultra phone’s camera accessory reminds me why Samsung and Google really need to catch up
articles.summary: Credit: Tushar Mehta / Android Authority I have been reviewing phones for almost a decade. And countless times over this period, brands have claimed that their phones can replace actual DSLRs or mirrorless cameras. Every time I’ve heard that, I have wanted to respond with The Rock’s raised eyebrow meme . Despite my skepticism, I cannot deny that I have encountered several great camera phones in recent years that reproduce an effect quite similar to that of an “actual” camera. Some phones, like the vivo X300 Pro , achieve that through the image’s superficial impression, while others, such as the OPPO Find X9 Pro , realize it through tactile feedback from elements like extendable lenses. My most recent interaction that evoked a similar sensation was with another camera stalwart, the Xiaomi 1
articles.title_zh: 這款 Ultra 手機的攝像頭配件讓我想起三星和 Google 為何真正需要追上
articles.summary_zh: 經過近十年的手機評測，許多品牌聲稱手機可替代 DSLR 或無反相機，但配件的出現讓這個差距更加明顯。

articles.title: Chrome’s new Gemini feature is awesome, but not enough to get me to switch back
articles.summary: Usually, when Google announces its latest AI-powered feature in Chrome, I don’t feel like I’m missing out on much. But that changed when the company announced Skills in Chrome . The feature, which lets you set shortcuts for specific prompts, is handy in a number of ways. And while I did feel envy for the first time in a long time, it wasn’t enough to tempt me back to the browser.
articles.title_zh: Chrome 新的 Gemini 功能很棒，但不足以讓我切換回去
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Chrome 中推出的 Skills 功能讓用戶可設定特定提示的快捷方式，雖然實用但還不足以改變使用習慣。

articles.title: I spent three hours gaming on the OnePlus Nord 6, and the 9,000mAh battery surprised me
articles.summary: Smartphone battery capacities have gone through the stratosphere lately. Take the OnePlus Nord 6 , for instance — boasting a massive 9,000mAh silicon-carbon battery that instantly grabs your attention. It does sound reassuring, almost like you won’t have to think about charging at all. But I’ve learned not to take these figures at face value. What actually matters is how that battery behaves when you use the phone the way you normally would. That’s where optimization makes all the difference. And that difference becomes even more obvious when you start gaming. Graphically intensive games don’t exactly go easy on a phone — they push performance, keep the system constantly working, and naturally put more pressure on the battery. So, I decided to spend three hours straight gaming on the Nord
articles.title_zh: 我在 OnePlus Nord 6 上玩了三小時遊戲，9,000mAh 電池讓我驚訝
articles.summary_zh: OnePlus Nord 6 配備龐大的 9,000mAh 矽碳電池，在長時間遊戲中表現出色且令人印象深刻。

articles.title: Weekly deals: iPhone Air and iPhone 17 get price cuts, Galaxy S26 and Pixel 10/10 Pro on sale too
articles.summary: The Apple iPhone Air wasn’t the first super-slim phone, but it was the phone that started the craze, anyway – Apple has that effect on the market. Right now, the phone is up to €480 off. That gets you a 6.5” LTPO display (120Hz) and the powerful Apple A19 Pro chipset. The 3,149mAh battery is oh-so-small, but it still achieved a decent 12:44h Active Use Score – and there’s a variety of MagSafe products out there that can help to extend the runtime. There’s no fixing the single 48MP (1/1.56”) camera situation, though. Apple...
articles.title_zh: 每週特價：iPhone Air 和 iPhone 17 降價，Galaxy S26 和 Pixel 10/10 Pro 也在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: iPhone Air 目前最高優惠 €480，配備 6.5 吋 LTPO 屏幕和強大的 Apple A19 Pro 芯片，以及 3,149mAh 電池。

articles.title: Oppo Find X9 Ultra Khronos Creator Kit hands-on
articles.summary: Recent Chinese Ultra smartphones are very formidable imaging tools, and you could say that the Oppo Find X9 Ultra is at the absolute top of that pile. But it's always exciting when you can augment what's already great so you can expand its use. And there's hardly a better way than with these new and evolving photography kits we're getting for recent smartphones. Today, we've got a slightly different set of accessories to unbox - the Khronos Creator Kit for the Oppo Find X9 Ultra. Made by Tilta, this is quite the extensive video-capture kit. When fully assembled, it's a camera cage with...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Find X9 Ultra Khronos Creator Kit 動手玩
articles.summary_zh: Oppo Find X9 Ultra 是中國頂級 Ultra 智能手機中的佼佼者，新推出的配件套件可進一步擴展其影像功能。

articles.title: OnePlus Pad 4 hands-on review
articles.title_zh: OnePlus Pad 4 動手評測

articles.title: Weekly poll: Would you buy the Oppo Find X9 Ultra? What about the Oppo Find X9s?
articles.summary: vivo set the benchmark with the X300 Ultra – a €2,000 camera flagship – while the Xiaomi 17 Ultra has a “modest” €1,500 price. Now the Oppo Find X9 Ultra looks to topple the competition with an in-between price tag of €1,700. The phone certainly impressed in our review, though the outcome of the vivo vs. Oppo Ultra final battle is yet to be decided. We also went hands-on with the Hasselblad Earth Explorer Kit for the Oppo Find X9 Ultra. This kit contains a 300mm add-on lens, an adapter for 67mm filters and a lens collar with a tripod mount. Oppo Find X9 Ultra If you think that the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：你會購買 Oppo Find X9 Ultra 嗎？Oppo Find X9s 呢？
articles.summary_zh: Oppo Find X9 Ultra 以 €1,700 的售價位於 vivo X300 Ultra 和 Xiaomi 17 Ultra 之間，在評測中表現令人印象深刻。

articles.title: Asus Zenbook A16 (2026) Review: Savor the Power, Ignore the Beige
articles.summary: This $2,000 Asus laptop delivers breathtaking performance thanks to Qualcomm's Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, but at the cost of nearly everything else.
articles.title_zh: Asus Zenbook A16 (2026) 評測：享受強大效能，忽視米色外觀
articles.summary_zh: 這款售價 $2,000 的 Asus 筆電憑藉 Qualcomm Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme 提供令人驚豔的效能，但代價是幾乎放棄了其他所有功能。

articles.title: 15 Best Gifts for Plant Lovers and Gardeners (2026)

articles.title: 【2026 企業資安大調查】一張圖看2026年服務業企業資安風險
articles.summary:
服務業CIO今年特別重視員工賦能和IT維運效能的提升，但在加速衝刺之際，也得特別留意與人員相關的資安威脅。服務業今年在高衝擊高風險的第一象限，足足有6項人員類風險和6項系統類風險得優先防範。
服務業未來一年得特別防備的首要風險是「網路釣魚/社交工程手段」，次要風險則包括了「勒索軟體資安事故」和「資安漏洞濫用」，另外，服務業得留意多項人員面的風險，包括「商業郵件詐騙」、「瀏覽惡意網站」、「身分冒用」、「個人資料外洩」和「機敏資料外洩」，都進入了第一象限。 立即下載完整報告【iThome 2026 CIO & CISO大調查】資安策略篇完整報告

articles.title: cPanel重大漏洞釀災！勒索軟體Sorry已濫用此弱點對多個網站發動攻擊
articles.summary: 從4月30日開始，我們持續追蹤cPanel與WHM重大資安漏洞CVE-2026-41940的消息，就當大家以為資安風險暴露的狀況應該獲得改善之際，十多個小時之前，資安新聞媒體Bleeping Computer收到許多消息來源指出，有多個駭客組織已經濫用這個漏洞滲透多臺伺服器，並且部署以Go語言寫成的加密勒索軟體Sorry。
